summary: Carrier admin wizard step for configuring the company notification contact. Displays existing notification_contact users from useCarrierResources.contacts, opens a create modal using useCreateCarrierPersonnel with rolesArray: ['notification_contact'], and reports step validity to CompanySetupScreen. Follows SetupStepPersonnel + CreatePersonnelModal pattern.

businessIntent.problem: The carrier company needs a designated contact who receives operational notifications. This is a distinct role from dispatch — it may be a manager, owner, or external coordinator.
businessIntent.expectedOutcome: Screen renders existing notification contacts, allows adding one via a modal (rolesArray fixed to ['notification_contact']), shows temp password if isNewAuthUser is true, and calls onValidationChange(true) when >= 1 contact exists.

selectedBuildingBlocks.name: screen-hook-separation
selectedBuildingBlocks.reason: Screen only renders — data comes from useCarrierResources hook, write via useCreateCarrierPersonnel

selectedBuildingBlocks.name: loading-empty-error-state
selectedBuildingBlocks.reason: Empty state when no contact configured; loading while useCarrierResources initializes

existingPatternsToFollow: sharedProps pattern from parent: { data, setData, onValidationChange }
If response.isNewAuthUser === true, show Alert with response.tempPassword
isModalVisible / setIsModalVisible local state for create modal
Call onValidationChange(contacts.length > 0) when contacts list updates
knownAntiPatternsToAvoid: rolesArray must always be ['notification_contact'] — never let the user change the role in this step
Do not suppress the isNewAuthUser / tempPassword alert — the admin must see the temporary password
No direct Firestore calls in screen — use hooks only
No hardcoded colors, strings, or spacing

claudeCodeOnly: Register WizardStepContact in CompanySetupScreen SETUP_TABS array

create.description: Wizard step screen: lists existing notification_contact users from useCarrierResources.contacts, opens a create modal using useCreateCarrierPersonnel with fixed rolesArray: ['notification_contact'], shows Alert with tempPassword if isNewAuthUser is true.
Dynamic styles for WizardStepContact using theme and appearance.

dataModelsTouched.notes: Read via useCarrierResources(vendorID).contacts (already filtered by notification_contact role). Write via useCreateCarrierPersonnel which calls createVendorUser Cloud Function.

failureEscalationRules: If useCarrierResources import fails: verify hook exports contacts field
If useCreateCarrierPersonnel import fails: verify path src/modules/projects/hooks/carrier/useCreateCarrierPersonnel

steps: Generate WizardStepContact.tsx following SetupStepPersonnel + CreatePersonnelModal reference patterns
Generate styles.ts following existing screen style patterns
Produce handoff package for Claude Code integration

claudeCodeIntegrationPlan.reason: Screen must be registered in CompanySetupScreen SETUP_TABS and tempPassword alert must be verified.
steps: Register WizardStepContact in CompanySetupScreen SETUP_TABS array
Verify in simulator: contacts list renders, add modal opens, tempPassword alert shows when isNewAuthUser is true
simulatorValidation: Open Company Setup wizard — navigate to Contact tab
Add a notification contact — verify temp password alert appears
Verify contact appears in the list after creation

steps: Remove WizardStepContact entry from CompanySetupScreen SETUP_TABS

acceptanceCriteria: Displays list of existing notification_contact users from useCarrierResources.contacts
Shows empty state when no contact configured
Add button opens create modal with firstName/lastName/email/phoneNumber fields
rolesArray is always ['notification_contact'] — not shown to or changeable by the user
If response.isNewAuthUser === true, Alert shows the temporary password
No hardcoded colors, strings, or spacing
